questions: rod e pore gele ki korbo
answers: For sunburn, apply cool compresses or take a cool bath, use aloe vera gel, drink plenty of water, and take ibuprofen for pain. Avoid further sun exposure until healed.
Rod e pore gele thanda pani diye wash korun, aloe vera gel lagayen, moisturizer use korun, ar pani beshi khaan. Foska uthle futaben na — infection hote pare.
Sunburn prevention: Apply SPF 30+ sunscreen 15 minutes before going out, reapply every 2 hours, wear hats and long sleeves, and avoid peak sun hours (10am-4pm).
Sunburn hole aloe vera gel, coconut oil, ba calamine lotion lagayen. Peeling hole scratch korben na. Severe sunburn e jor, chills, blisters thakle doctor dekhano uchit.
